Name: NEW: Bluebeam Cloud​
Description: Web and mobile solutions included with your subscription​
Bluebeam Cloud is a suite of easy-to-use solutions that seamlessly connect with Revu 21 and enable you to easily markup, collaborate and manage workflows on the go.
• Gain flexibility by accessing your existing markups, Tool Chest and Studio Project documents from Revu​
• Streamline communication by commenting and collaborating on documents with your team in real-time​
• Save time by managing punch, RFI and submittal workflows on the go​
• Better visualize and connect project data with geolocational insights​
